title: Advanced Durability
description: A Minecraft Paper Plugin That Lets You Set Durability To Items That Have Durability. Perfect For Scripted Videos
body:
A minecraft plugin that lets operators change item durabilities. Perfect for scripted videos.

**Commands:**

/durability <amount> - Operator Only

**Notes**

Cannot be used on items without durabilities. 

The lowest durability you can set is zero.
